# imageProvider

**Instance Property**

The image to display in the complication.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var imageProvider: CLKImageProvider { get set }
```

## Setting the Complication Data

- **fillFraction**: The fraction of the ring to fill.
- **ringStyle**: The style of the progress ring.
